title: Farcry 6 Procedural Generation
description: My work on procedural generation tools and techniques for creating dynamic environments in Farcry 6

blocks.text: Placeholder copy — replace with final. As a Technical Artist on Far Cry 6, I built procedural generation systems in Houdini and integrated them with the Dunia engine to author large-scale open-world environments: terrain, foliage, rivers, waterfalls, roads, and volcanic terrain materials. The breakdowns below show the procedural systems and the in-engine results they produced.

Placeholder copy — replace with final. Top-down overview of the generated world. Houdini graphs distributed biomes, landmarks, and points of interest across the map while respecting terrain constraints and gameplay zones.

blocks.alt: Far Cry 6 generated world map overview
Far Cry 6 full world map generation

blocks.text: Placeholder copy — replace with final. Procedural beach generation: sand distribution, shoreline foam lines, and asset scattering (rocks, driftwood, vegetation) driven by slope and elevation masks exported from Houdini.

Placeholder copy — replace with final. Cliff and rock generation from heightfield-based erosion. Houdini emitted cliff geometry and decimated rock assets onto steep slopes, with material blending driven by angle and altitude.

blocks.alt: Procedural cliff generation in Far Cry 6

blocks.text: Placeholder copy — replace with final. Volcanic terrain surrounding the lava lake. Procedural systems layered cracked-rock, ash, and ember materials and scattered heat-resistant assets to sell a believable volcanic biome.

blocks.alt: Volcanic lava lake terrain in Far Cry 6
Far Cry 6 lava lake material layering

blocks.text: Placeholder copy — replace with final. Drag the slider to compare the raw procedural output with the polished, artist-directed result. The transition shows how procedural terrain materials were refined into the final in-engine look.

Placeholder copy — replace with final. Procedural road generation that follows the terrain contour, cuts/fills embankments, and lays down road material with blended shoulders connecting gameplay points of interest.

blocks.alt: Procedural road generation in Far Cry 6

blocks.text: Placeholder copy — replace with final. River and waterfall placement driven by flow simulations in Houdini, with FX, foam, and mist integrated into the engine to sit naturally within the generated terrain.

blocks.alt: Procedural waterfall integration in Far Cry 6

blocks.text: Placeholder copy — replace with final. Profiling and optimization of the procedural pipeline to keep generation, streaming, and draw-call budgets within target frame time across the open world.

blocks.alt: Far Cry 6 procedural pipeline performance profiling
